name: Abdallah Amadou Gueye
title: Frontend / Product Engineer
subtitle: Building with Love and Passion
description: Hi, I'm Abdallah, a Frontend & Product Engineer passionate about crafting fast, intuitive, and developer-friendly web experiences. I specialize in React, Next.js, and building systems that help teams ship better products faster.

about.bio: I'm Abdallah Amadou Gueye, a passionate Frontend / Product Engineer from Senegal. With a Master's degree in Applied Computer Science, I specialize in building high-performance web applications with React and Next.js.
about.experience: Experienced in shipping production systems, migrating large Next.js codebases, building reusable component systems and helping teams and developers unblock and ship faster.
